title: Better Mining Enchantments
description: Currently adds two new pickaxe enchantments to the game, with more coming in the future.
body:
# Better Mining Enchantments

Currently adds 2 new enchantments that are exclusive to pickaxes:

- Obsidian Efficiency (I - III): Increased mining speed when mining obsidian based blocks
- Smelting (I): Raw ores and ancient debris automatically smelt when mined. Exclusive with silk touch

New enchantments are registered to villager trades and enchanting table

***
This mod will be updated with more enchantments in the future.

This mod is part of a larger group of mods that is called "Better Enchantments". This is bigger mod isn't released yet.

Inspired By:

- Obsidian Breaker from Better Nether by BetterX
- Smelting Touch by UltrusBot

Pack Art:
-JSCitrin40
